reviews.review_title: Needs real rythm not just drums
reviews.review_description: The game is really good and gets difficult as you go but maybe some kind of music rythm to follow along instead of just drums. Kind of like in guitar hero type where you get bonuses and new added tricks would be great, where fzero meets guitar hero and just dance 😉

reviews.review_title: Very addictive but needs gamepad support
reviews.review_description: This game is easily in the top 5 games for Oculus GO. It has a psychodelic atmosphere which is very cool and an addictive gameplay but it becomes almost impossible in higher levels with the Oculus Go controller.

developer_response.body: We've added gamepad support (update 1.03) and I hope you check it out!

reviews.review_description: It’s a pretty good game I had lots of fun playing it!
This game is very strategic and action but it’s  a very fun  game

Games great. Fast paced, visually beautiful, good difficulty, boss fights. Unfortunately I can't enjoy the game because my touchpad wants to randomly change the registered direction causing me to die frequently which is a game breaker. I have played through regardless because the games that good. For this reason I give it 5 stars. Maybe in the future Oculus can make a decent touchpad.
I'm new to VR and this is by far my favorite game!
The difficulty of this game is that of Asian level. Even with it's high difficulty this game is f*cking amazing every single Oculus go should come with it  by default it is an experience worth while
I really like it. It’s an easy concept, yet complicated enough to keep my interest. Plus the visuals are pretty trippy which I love.
Lately whenever I've been feeling slightly depressed and gloomy I play Thumper for a bit, and I feel oddly great afterwards... cheerful, awake and alert.

4/5 stars - This game is very immersive and pretty challenging. Theres a learning curve.. which most challenging and rewarding games have. My only complaint (and I havnt beat the game fully yet) but i feel like every single level has the same rhythm, beat and sounds.. if anything, the same beats and sounds just speed up the next level. Just wish i didnt get the same exact ‘vibe’ every level because there are some awesome visuals that evoke different emotions and thoughts throughout the levels.

I dont understand why most people are complaining about this game. This is really the best rhythm game on Oculus GO. The controls on the GO controller are very nice and stable, the gameplay is a definite 11/10, the soundtrack is mysterious and scary, it really fits with the game! The levels are pretty easy until you get to level 4, where it gets intensely hard because of the switching lanes. This game is probably (in my opinion) in my top 3 list of Oculus Go, games. IF YOU ARE HESITATING GETTING THIS GAME, JUST TAKE YOUR FINGER AND PRESS PURCHASE RIGHT AWAY! I really hope there are going to be more levels soon. Or even a new game made by Drool. You will not regret getting this game! 🤩😇🤑
Favorite game on Go so far

Please fix your GO configuration! Instead of pushing the button down for both turning and jumping, just make it so you only touch left or right to turn and push to jump! It'll make your game way more playable if you set up the touchpad that way! Hope that helps!
The go library has very few games of worthy challenge with immersive graphics. This is one of them.

I already own thumper on the PSVR and love it. When I saw it available on the Oculus GO I wasn’t sure they could pull it off. I must say I’m impressed with how good this port is. Sure the graphics and sound take a hit but that’s to be expected considering the hardware. My only real issue is it’s rather glitchy. It will randomly try to close in the middle of a game. But overall it’s a great game for people new to VR.

Thumper is such a great game and is best played with headphones for immersion. This game is also great at not holding your hand the entire way. At the beginning of a level it lets you become familiar with any new controls or button combination and then throws everything at you. It's so much fun and I can't recommend it enough.
Such a fun game. Gets hard!

The Oculus Go controller is not the ideal controller for this game. It suffers from the absence of distinct buttons as it's too easy to press the wrong part of the smooth D-pad, especially when things speed up. It is fairly fun, but too hard for me with this controller.

reviews.review_title: Maybe a 5 star game w better controller
reviews.review_description: This game looks amazing and is very immersive, but it is almost impossible to play with the little Go controller; way to easy to hit the wrong direction on the tiny thumb pad. I suspect this would be a rockin game with an xbox style controller.
Definitely a challenging and fun game to play
